text: Bhai ko property ka zyada hissa mila taaki wo masters ke liye abroad ja sake, aur main MNC mein overtime kar raha hoon taaki ghar ki EMI chalti rahe. Main physically aur mentally poori tarah exhaust ho chuka hoon, par bade bhai hone ke naate main rukne ka risk nahi le sakta. Mere kandhon par poore parivaar ka bojh hai aur mujhe bina kisi break ke bas kaam karte rehna hai.

Joint family mein property batwara hua aur Papa ne bhai ko sab de diya kyunki main toh 'IT professional' hoon aur kama rahi hoon. Main WFH isolation mein din-raat coding kar rahi hoon taaki bhai ki shadi ki 'izzat' bani rahe aur unki lifestyle na ghir jaye. Main itni thaki hui hoon ki aankhein band ho rahi hain, par main afford nahi kar sakti ki main thoda bhi slow padun.

Bhai ko property ka bada share milne par 'log kya kahenge' ki chinta mein maine koi sawal nahi uthaya aur ab apni salary se sab manage kar raha hoon. Main burnout ki kagar par hoon par rukne ka option nahi hai kyunki chote bhai-behen ki padhai mere hi bharose hai. Bade hone ka farz yahi hai ki aap thak kar bhi endurance dikhate raho aur parivaar ko sambhale rakho.

MNC mein layoffs ki tension hai aur yahan property bhi bhai ke naam ho gayi, phir bhi mujhe bina ruke agle project par lagna hai. Main itna exhaust ho chuki hoon ki dimaag kaam nahi kar raha, par mujhe pata hai ki mera endurance hi ghar ki structural stability hai. Main complain nahi kar sakti kyunki mujhe bhai ki coaching fees aur ghar ke kharche har mahine time par dene hain.

Bade hone ki yahi keemat hai ki bhai ko azadi mili aur mujhe sirf obligations aur EMI ka bojh. Main itna thak gaya hoon ki lagta hai gir jaunga, par 'cannot afford to stop' wali feeling mujhe har subah utha deti hai. Meri kurbani hi bhai ka rasta saaf karegi, isliye mujhe ye duty bina kisi sawal ya break ke nibhani hai.
